stemHtml: What is the minimum clearance above obstacles to be maintained by an IFR flight overflying mountainous areas...

options.a: Twice the minimum terrain clearance under IFR when overflying low terrain.
options.b: The same as the minimum clearance for VFR flights overflying the congested areas of cities.
options.c: The same as the minimum terrain clearance under IFR when overflying low terrain.
options.d: Three times the minimum clearance under VFR above water.
